inputs.label: Strength Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for melee attacks and carrying capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for melee attacks and carrying capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakın dövüş saldırıları ve taşıma kapasitesi için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour les attaques de mêlée et la capacité de charge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para ataques cuerpo a cuerpo y capacidad de carga.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة القدرة للهجمات القريبة وقدرة الحمل.

inputs.label: Dexterity Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for ranged attacks and armor class.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for ranged attacks and armor class.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menzilli saldırılar ve zırh sınıfı için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour les attaques à distance et la classe d'armure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para ataques a distancia y clase de armadura.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة القدرة للهجمات بعيدة المدى ودرجة الدروع.

inputs.label: Constitution Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for hit points and concentration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for hit points and concentration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Can puanı ve konsantrasyon için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour les points de vie et la concentration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para puntos de golpe y concentración.

inputs.label: Intelligence Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for spellcasting and knowledge skills.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for spellcasting and knowledge skills.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Büyü yapma ve bilgi becerileri için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour lancer des sorts et les compétences de connaissance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para lanzar conjuros y habilidades de conocimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة القدرة لاستخدام السحر ومهارات المعرفة.

inputs.label: Wisdom Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for perception and insight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for perception and insight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Algı ve içgörü için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour la perception et la perspicacité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para percepción y perspicacia.

inputs.label: Charisma Score
inputs.businessContext: Ability score for social interactions and spellcasting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ability score for social interactions and spellcasting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sosyal etkileşimler ve büyü yapma için yetenek puanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fähigkeitswert für soziale Interaktionen und Zauberwirken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité pour les interactions sociales et lancer des sorts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de habilidad para interacciones sociales y lanzar conjuros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة القدرة للتفاعلات الاجتماعية وإلقاء التعاويذ.

inputs.label: Proficiency Bonus
inputs.businessContext: Bonus added to proficient skills and attacks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Bonus added to proficient skills and attacks.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yetenekli becerilere ve saldırılara eklenen bonus.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bonus, der auf geübte Fertigkeiten und Angriffe angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Bonus ajouté aux compétences maîtrisées et aux attaques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Bonificador añadido a habilidades y ataques competentes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مكافأة تضاف إلى المهارات والهجمات المتقنة.

inputs.label: Character Level
inputs.businessContext: Determines proficiency bonus and class features.

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines proficiency bonus and class features.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yetenek bonusunu ve sınıf özelliklerini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Détermine le bonus de maîtrise et les capacités de classe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Determina el bonificador de competencia y características de clase.

formulas.result: strength * dexterity * constitution * intelligence * (wisdom * charisma * proficiency_bonus * level)

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
